title: Refactor OCP-014 (OCP): The 'print' method contains a large switch statement dispatching on 'result.g...

detected_issue.description: The 'print' method contains a large switch statement dispatching on 'result.getResultType()'.
detected_issue.reasoning: Adding a new type of assertion result (new 'ResultWas::OfType' enum value) would require modifying this switch statement to add a new case, violating the Open/Closed Principle. This behavior should ideally be extended through polymorphism or a strategy pattern, where each result type knows how to print itself or has a dedicated printer strategy.

fix_logic.summary: Refactor AssertionPrinter to use a dispatch table for result types to improve OCP compliance.
fix_logic.rationale: Replaced the large switch statement with a static dispatch table mapping ResultWas types to printer functions. This allows adding new result types by updating the table rather than modifying the core logic flow, adhering to the Open/Closed Principle.
